label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's think about this question. The question is about whether a man intentionally shot a bird-watcher when he shot a deer. The scenario is: A hunter is trying to win a competition by killing a large deer. He gets the deer in his sights but notices bird-watchers on the other side of the deer. He knows the bullet might hit one of them, but he doesn't care about the bird-watchers.
